P2: Gauss-Bonnet with independent kappa2 and Myers B2
P3: cubic Lovelock with independent kappa3 and Myers B3
claim_boundary: Exact Lorentz normalization selects the SO(5) orbit of equatorial support. The existing action does not generate the required independent boundary dynamics. No preferred axis, observed spacetime, Standard Model map, physical fermion equation, monopole sector, measured input, absolute unit, or full-BHSM claim follows.
equator: standard Dirichlet boundary polynomials contain extrinsic-curvature factors and have zero background value at K_mn=0
near_collar: K is odd under y->-y, so a symmetric two-side construction supplies no positive even trap automatically
variation: cancels higher-curvature normal variations; it is not an independent boundary-field kinetic action
